scripts.version:patch: pnpm --filter @domain-safe/core --filter @domain-safe/sources --filter domain-safe exec npm version patch --no-git-tag-version
scripts.version:minor: pnpm --filter @domain-safe/core --filter @domain-safe/sources --filter domain-safe exec npm version minor --no-git-tag-version
scripts.version:major: pnpm --filter @domain-safe/core --filter @domain-safe/sources --filter domain-safe exec npm version major --no-git-tag-version
scripts.publish:dry-run: pnpm build && pnpm -r --filter @domain-safe/core --filter @domain-safe/sources --filter domain-safe publish --dry-run --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:all: pnpm build && pnpm -r --filter @domain-safe/core --filter @domain-safe/sources --filter domain-safe publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:cli: pnpm build && pnpm --filter domain-safe publish --access public --no-git-checks
